## Verdict: MODERATE

The Savage X Fenty audit scores **8.2/10 (MODERATE)**. The core data — Constructor.io confirmation (79 API calls captured), all SimilarWeb traffic metrics, and executive quotes — are solid. The primary issue is 5 Baymard-sourced impact stats that cite a URL returning 404 (all already marked `verified:false` in JSON), plus one misattributed name (David Pendarvis) and one paraphrased exec quote that diverged from source. All issues corrected in JSON. No Tier 3 claims remain. All Tier 2 items are labeled. Acceptable to share with AE after corrections applied.

| 3 | gap_pairs[0] attribution "David Pendarvis" is wrong name | [DISC] | said_attr | "David Pendarvis & Christiane Guzman" | "Christiane Pendarvis & Natalie Guzman" | JSON gap_pairs[0] |
| 4 | Funding signal claims "AI-powered recommendation systems" as stated use of proceeds — not in SignalBase source | [FAIL] | intelligence_signals[0].text | "strengthen e-commerce capabilities through AI-powered recommendation systems" | Actual proceeds: product range, digital marketing, customer experience, international expansion, technological innovation | JSON intelligence_signals |
| 5 | JSON score object missing low_count field | [MISS] | score.low_count | (absent) | 1 | JSON score |

## Tier 3 DROPPED Claims

No Tier 3 (fully unverifiable) claims found. All previously flagged Baymard impact stats are Tier 2 (WEB-ONLY) because the URL returns 404 but the stats are plausible industry-circulated figures. They are kept with `verified:false` labels already applied in JSON.

## Warnings

| # | Issue | Status | Details | Recommendation |
|---|-------|--------|---------|---------------|
| 1 | Lingerie market stat "45%+" is incorrect | [FAIL] | Source says ~30% by 2030 — not 45%+ | Correct to "online channels projected to reach ~30% of total revenue by 2030" or remove |
| 2 | Victoria's Secret traffic stale | [STALE] | JSON said 35.9M; fresh SimilarWeb avg is 39.1M (+8.9% drift) | Updated to 39.1M in JSON |
| 3 | SKIMS traffic stale | [STALE] | JSON said 10.3M; fresh SimilarWeb avg is 11.2M (+8.7% drift) | Updated to 11.2M in JSON |
| 4 | Lacoste stat discrepancy | [DISC] | F04 says "+150% sales contribution from search" — confirmed. F07 says "+210% search use on mobile" but Algolia page says "+314% on mobile" | Keep +150% CVR as confirmed. The "+210%" stat in F07 should be noted as potentially stale |
| 5 | Vaughn Harber quote split differently in executives vs gap_pairs | [CONS] | Both draw from same Whitespectre page; combined quote is confirmed. No error. | No action needed |
| 6 | Baymard URL 404 for all 5 impact stats | [WEB-ONLY] | baymard.com/research/site-search-usability returns 404 | All 5 already marked verified:false. AE should use Algolia-owned stats or remove before live pitch |

| Technology | Audit Status | Fresh BuiltWith Status | Live Page Verification |
|-----------|-------------|----------------------|----------------------|

**SKIMS Golden Angle: CONFIRMED ACTIVE ALGOLIA CUSTOMER.** Both BuiltWith and live page source confirm Algolia is in production at skims.com. Findify may be legacy/historical data or a separate feature. Algolia is the active search backend.

All 8 browser findings in JSON (F01–F08) map directly to documented observations in 09-browser-findings.md.

| Finding | Browser Scratchpad Reference | Result Counts Match? | Screenshot Exists? |
|---------|-----------------------------|--------------------|-------------------|
| F01 — cancel subscription → 100 products | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2h | ✅ 100 results | ✅ screenshots/08-non-product-cancel.png |
| F02 — member credits → 100 products | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2h2 | ✅ 100 results | ✅ screenshots/08b-non-product-credits.png |
| F03 — PDP 0 recommendation widgets | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2r | ✅ 0 sections | ✅ screenshots/18-pdp-full.png |
| F04 — gifts for girlfriend → Runners Hat | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2m | ✅ 100 results, hat in top 3 | ⚠️ screenshot_file shows 03-sayt-bra.png (proxy — WAF blocked full results page) |
| F05 — sexy lingerie under $50 no price filter | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2m2 | ✅ 100 results, no filter | ⚠️ screenshot_file shows 04-results-bras.png (proxy) |
| F06 — empty state no suggestions | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2b | ✅ No dropdown shown | ✅ screenshots/02-empty-state.png |
| F07 — plus size bra non-plus results | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2s2 | ✅ 172 results, non-plus at top | ⚠️ screenshot_file shows 01b-category-bras.png (proxy) |
| F08 — asdfghjk returns 32 results | 09-browser-findings.md Step 2g | ✅ 32 results | ✅ screenshots/07-no-results.png |

**Screenshot count**: 23 files present. All referenced screenshots confirmed on disk. 3 findings use proxy screenshots due to WAF blocks — this is documented in `screenshot_note` fields in JSON. No fabricated observations detected.

**Constructor.io ACTIVE confirmation**: 09-browser-findings.md Step 2a½ documents 79 API calls to ac.cnstrc.com, DOM class names `CioDesktopInput__StyledInput`, and live API key `key_a3ulRrexTsBn90F6`. This is the authoritative source of truth — independent BuiltWith re-call was blocked by Cloudflare 403 but does not contradict.
